abstract: Allow people to add Matter accessories to your platform.

codeExamples.code:
import MatterSupport
import os.log

let homes = [MatterAddDeviceRequest.Home(name: "My Home")]
let topology = MatterAddDeviceRequest.Topology(ecosystemName: "MyEcosystemName", homes: homes)

overview:
## Overview

With the MatterSupport framework, you can administer, add, and configure Matter devices in your ecosystem using an iOS device. To onboard a device, you need to configure discovery, set up a home, create an extension request handler, and override its methods.

### Configure discovery

Add the following to your app’s `Info.plist` so it can discover Matter-related services. See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/BundleResources/Information-Property-List/NSBonjourServices] for more information.

### Set up the home

Define the home’s name, then create the topology and pass your ecosystem name and an array of homes.

Use the newly created topology object to create a request to add a device.

You can optionally provide the Matter setup code programmatically while setting up a Matter device in an ecosystem. To do this, pass a string containing the payload information from the device’s packaging, such as a QR code. For more information on when this is appropriate, see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/BundleResources/Entitlements/com.apple.developer.matter.allow-setup-payload].

Next, start the user interface flow for adding the device. Handle any errors that may occur during the setup.

### Create the extension request handler

Subclass [doc://com.apple.MatterSupport/documentation/MatterSupport/MatterAddDeviceExtensionRequestHandler] and override its methods. This class facilitates the user interface flow during the setup of a new Matter device.

### Set the principal class

Register the subclass you created above in the app’s `Info.plist` as the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/BundleResources/Information-Property-List/NSPrincipalClass] for the `com.apple.matter.support.extension.device-setup` extension point identifier.

items.description: A request that adds and sets up a device into an ecosystem.
items.name: MatterAddDeviceRequest

items.description: The object that handles configuration and commissioning of a device into an ecosystem.
items.name: MatterAddDeviceExtensionRequestHandler

title: Adding Matter support to your ecosystem
